nodes.label: AI in therapeutic context
nodes.label_negative: AI as impractical or generic suggestion generator
nodes.grounding_span: AI to help generate suggestions for therapeutic activities

nodes.label: AI as advisory tool for feasibility and suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: some suggestions will be unfeasible as our site lacks the required equipment

nodes.label: AI idea generality vs. specificity
nodes.grounding_span: less akin to generic suggestions that you would find in the top results of a Google search

nodes.label: AI use for person-centered and risk-sensitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI use for high-risk individual tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Suggestions for anything person centred...or to do with risk assessments, I would not use AI for

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to creative suggestion role only
nodes.grounding_span: AI assisting with other routine, more systematic areas of site management

nodes.label: Service quality and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: get us thinking about how we can be innovative with the resources available on site

nodes.label: Patient safety and quality of care
nodes.grounding_span: the cost for utilising information that could result in harm/risk to the individual is so high

nodes.label: Efficiency and cost reduction
nodes.grounding_span: AI assisting with other routine, more systematic areas of site management

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's impractical suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: frustrating when the model provides clearly impractical options

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: Some nuanced, more detailed examples can be very useful

nodes.label: Caution toward AI in high-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would not use AI for, as the cost for utilising information that could result in harm/risk to the individual is so high

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I could definitely see AI assisting with other routine, more systematic areas of site management

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: After requesting an initial round of suggestions, I can include more information...or redirect the model

nodes.label: Pragmatic adaptation of AI suggestions to real-world constraints
nodes.grounding_span: We might extract some elements of an activity and make it more appropriate
